custom_commands: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; INSTALLER_DIR=/opt/arch-linux-setups; INSTALLER_SRC=; if [ -d /run/arch-linux-setups-installer ]; then INSTALLER_SRC=/run/arch-linux-setups-installer; elif [ -d /proc/1/root/run/arch-linux-setups-installer ]; then INSTALLER_SRC=/proc/1/root/run/arch-linux-setups-installer; elif [ -d /proc/1/root/root/installer-src ]; then INSTALLER_SRC=/proc/1/root/root/installer-src; fi; rm -rf "$INSTALLER_DIR"; if [ -n "$INSTALLER_SRC" ]; then echo "==> Using local staged installer from $INSTALLER_SRC"; cp -a "$INSTALLER_SRC" "$INSTALLER_DIR"; else echo "==> Local staged installer unavailable, using GitHub fallback"; git clone https://github.com/FrosteAto/Arch-Linux-Setups.git "$INSTALLER_DIR"; fi; chmod -R a+rX "$INSTALLER_DIR" && find "$INSTALLER_DIR" -type f -name "*.sh" -exec chmod a+x {} \;'

bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p /var/log/arch-linux-setups; LOG=/var/log/arch-linux-setups/install-$(date +%F_%H-%M-%S).log; echo "==> Running installer (MODE=server)"; echo "==> Logging to $LOG"; env MODE=server stdbuf -oL -eL bash /opt/arch-linux-setups/install.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG"'
